full_text:
Hu Lie (Wuxuan) 胡烈 (武玄)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hu Lie (胡烈), styledWuxuan (武玄). Took part in invasion of Shu, got former a vassal to warn his son about Zhong Hui’s revolt. Hu Lie was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
